quote: Can't tell you how bloody ripped I am to have my own House Truck! Li and his team worked round the clock to get my rig not just great but beyond my expectations. I can't recommend these guys enough.

We were able to drive all the way out to Lake Eyre on a 4x4 road that caravans and trailers were banned from. Having your slide-on on our small AWD truck is perhaps one of the highlights of our travelling life.
A big shout out to Li, Alex, Oscar and Melissa at Beyond RV. Worth the wait. We love the set-up, the quality of the build and the space that we have.
